## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what artifact or improvement is this? -->

## Maintenance Rule

1. What production responsibility does this demonstrate?
2. What engineering judgment does it make visible?
3. How does it stay focused on DevOps platform work and public-safe?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Artifact added under `docs/` or `examples/`
- [ ] Examples parse and pass `python scripts/validate.py`
- [ ] No employer-private detail (names, hostnames, IPs, account IDs, credentials, state)
